title: Sreina
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{City |image=[[File:Escape_from_Janara.jpg]] |name=Sreina |constructed= |destroyed=[[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]] |rebuilt= |builder= |mayor= |celestialbody=[[Janara III]] |continent= |location= |climate= |interest= |population=None after 6 BBY |demonym= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|Civilized? You call what the Judicator did on Janara III civilized?''"
"''The High Inquisitor's orders came from the Emperor himself. The Rebel stronghold there…''"
"''There was no Rebel stronghold there, and you know that! You saw the destruction yourself. Innocent children and their families were murdered by your weapons!|[[Alexandra Winger]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Brandei]]|{{SWArchive|url=fans/hyperspace/fiction/shadesofgray/index.html|text=Shades of Gray: from the Adventures of Alex Winger}}}} '''Sreina''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Janara III]] with suspected ties to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. [[Matt Turhaya]] left his daughter [[Alexandra Winger|Alex]] with relatives in Sreina prior to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces [[Raid on Janara III|razing]] the city to the ground. {{City-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|7|Passages}} {{1stm}} *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/shadesofgray/index.html|text="Shades of Gray"|int=Shades of Gray|newhost=Suvudu}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Cities]] [[Category:Galactic Empire cities]]
